scripts.postbuild: cp config-source.json dist/ && cp CNAME dist/ 2>/dev/null || true && find dist -name index.html -exec grep -L 'markdown.js' {} \; | xargs -I{} sed -i '' 's|<script src="js/router.js" defer></script>|<script src="js/router.js" defer></script>\n    <script src="js/markdown.js" defer></script>|' {}
scripts.start: npm run build  && npm run dev
